positive: A stylized illustration of a celestial mountain range viewed at dusk. The mountains have deep, saturated purples and twilight blues, contrasting sharply with a bright, oversized crescent moon and scattered stars. A gentle, sweeping aurora borealis crosses the sky, rendered in luminous teals and soft pinks. A single, elegant silhouette of a soaring hawk is positioned in the central foreground, ready to take flight. The style should be minimalist, vector-art inspired, high-contrast graphic design suitable for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, vibrant colors, strong depth, isolated on a pure white or transparent background.
negative: blur, watermark, text, low detail, ugly, deformed, signature, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, realistic photo, logo, writing, graffiti
